references.title: A Large Scale Project to Develop Personalized Learning Pathways at a University
references.journal: Online Journal of Distance Learning Administration

annotations.text: Online learning is often presential learning done remotely, which hinders the ability to deliver on the promise of personalized learning, often leading to lower retention. CSU-Global attempts to mitigate this. Thus, this online HEI started designing multiple learning pathways for their learners.
